title: Eggs: Scrambled Eggs
description: Learn to make fluffy scrambled eggs.

steps.instruction: Crack two eggs into a bowl.

check.prompt: Have you cracked two eggs into a bowl? (Yes/No)

steps.instruction: Add a splash of milk or water (optional) and whisk well.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium-low heat. Add a small amount of butter or oil.

check.prompt: Is the pan heated with butter/oil? (Yes/No)

steps.instruction: Pour the egg mixture into the pan. Let it set for a few seconds.

check.prompt: Have you poured the eggs into the pan? (Yes/No)

steps.instruction: Gently push the cooked eggs from the edges towards the center, allowing uncooked egg to flow underneath. Continue until cooked to your liking.

check.prompt: Are the eggs cooked to your desired consistency? (Yes/No)
